Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user is asking me to analyze a loan application process based on both strict normative rules and recommended best practices desiderata I need to look at the event log provided and identify violations of the normative rules then check for deviations from the desiderata

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First Ill start by understanding the normative process behavior The sequence must be Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case The key points here are that each step must follow in order and after a loan decision if approved documentation must be finalized before closing if rejected just close without documentation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 All steps seem in order Application received then credit check risk assessment decision approved informed applicant finalized documentation closed No issues here

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 The first issue is that Risk Assessment happens before Credit Check The timestamps for Case 2 are Application Received at 0800 Risk Assessment at 0820 no prior Credit Check Credit Check at 0900 So here Risk Assessment is done before Credit Check which violates the rule that Credit Check must come before Risk Assessment Thats a normative violation Then the Loan Decision is Rejected but they still do Finalize Documentation which is not allowed So two violations here wrong order and finalizing after rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Application received on 0112 then Credit Check on 0114 at 1000 The desideratum says Credit Check should be within 24 hours From 0112 0900 to 0114 1000 is about 49 hours which is more than 24 hours So thats a desideratum violation Then Risk Assessment Loan Decision approved Inform Applicant on 0116 which is 48 hours after the decision assuming the decision was on 0114 1200 Wait the Loan Decision is at 1200 on 0114 and Inform Applicant is on 0116 1500 Thats 2 days and 3 hours which is more than 48 hours So thats another desideratum violation Also theres no Follow up Call mentioned which is a desideratum but not a strict rule

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now for the normative violations Case 2 has two Risk Assessment before Credit Check and Finalize Documentation after rejection Case 1 and 3 are okay for normative Desiderata violations Case 3 Credit Check delayed beyond 24 hours Inform Applicant beyond 48 hours no Follow up Call

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I need to present this clearly explaining each violation and the reasons Also suggest possible justifications where applicable like maybe in Case 2 the Credit Check was delayed but then done but the order is still wrong For Case 3 maybe the Credit Check was delayed due to system issues but thats just a desideratum Make sure to clarify that desiderata are not strict so those are just recommendations
